mapper.sql: SELECT record_id, park_id, business_type, business_key, process_def_key, process_def_id, process_name, process_ins_id, process_status, current_node_key, current_node, contract_id, payment_id, customer_id, room_ids, template_key, form_key, form_data_json, attachment_json, print_file_url, approval_time, remark, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM biz_contract_workflow_record

SELECT cwr.record_id, cwr.park_id, cwr.business_type, cwr.business_key, cwr.process_def_key, cwr.process_def_id, cwr.process_name, cwr.process_ins_id, cwr.process_status, cwr.current_node_key, cwr.current_node, cwr.contract_id, cwr.payment_id, cwr.customer_id, cwr.room_ids, cwr.template_key, cwr.form_key, cwr.form_data_json, cwr.attachment_json, cwr.print_file_url, cwr.approval_time, cwr.remark, cwr.del_flag, cwr.create_by, cwr.create_time, cwr.update_by, cwr.update_time, c.contract_no, c.contract_name, c.customer_name, c.room_name, c.building_name, c.contract_status, CASE c.contract_status WHEN '0' THEN '待审批' WHEN '1' THEN '生效' WHEN '2' THEN '已到期' WHEN '3' THEN '已续签' WHEN '4' THEN '已退租' WHEN '5' THEN '待盖章' WHEN '6' THEN '退租中' WHEN '7' THEN '退租交接中' WHEN '8' THEN '房屋验收中' ELSE '未知' END AS contract_status_name, c.monthly_rent, c.deposit, c.start_date, c.end_date FROM biz_contract_workflow_record cwr LEFT JOIN biz_contract c ON c.contract_id = cwr.contract_id
mapper.select: ORDER BY cwr.create_time DESC, cwr.record_id DESC
WHERE process_ins_id = #{processInsId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY record_id DESC LIMIT 1
